description: You are an archivist at the Industrial History Archive of Cleveland. Create a formal Finding Aid for 'The Sterling Radiator Company Records' in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the metadata and inventory list provided in /home/ga/Documents/collection_metadata.json. The document must include a title page (containing the collection title, dates 1922-1965, and archive name), an automated Table of Contents, and page numbers. The finding aid must be organized into sections for 'Descriptive Summary', 'Biographical/Historical Note', 'Scope and Contents', and a 'Container List'. Within the 'Container List', organize the items by Series and present them in tables with columns for Box, Folder, Title, and Date. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/Sterling_Finding_Aid.odt.
